headline: The Oil World Is Splintering — And America Has The Backup Plan
summary: Iran war disruptions are rerouting global oil flows, pushing buyers toward U.S. crude and reshaping energy trade as the old Persian Gulf order cracks.

headline: EQT (EQT) Releases Financial and Operational Results for Q1 2026
summary: EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) is one of the Best Bargain Stocks to Buy in May. On April 21, the company released financial and operational results for Q1 2026, with sales volume coming at 618 Bcfe and above the high-end of guidance. This was because of healthy well performance, system pressure optimization, as well as strong execution […]
